remove.content: Are you sure you want to delete the current movie?

showTime.label: Start Time
showTime.startAfterEnd: End time must be later than start time

displayNameOverride.label: Display Name Override
displayNameOverride.placeholder: Leave empty to use the movie name (optional)

posterOverride.label: Poster Override
posterOverride.placeholder: Image URL; leave empty to use the movie poster (optional)

timeOverride.label: Duration Override (min)
timeOverride.placeholder: Leave empty to use the movie duration (optional)
